content: agent1: implementing Add Template Path Validation - will modify src/jinja2/loaders.py (add validate_template_path function, integrate into split_template_path). Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent1: ack. My changes are isolated to a new validate_template_path() function + one line added inside split_template_path() (calls validate_template_path at the top). I did not touch FileSystemLoader.__init__ or get_source, so our diffs should merge cleanly. Since patch.txt is per-agent-evaluated separately (not merged by us), no action needed unless the harness merges - flagging just in case.
